titles.title: Till I Get to That Place

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes you may feel like you’re going under And there seems to be no way out People may say that your God has left you Why do you still keep holding on

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But there’s a course that is set before me I’m not giving up, I’m looking ahead And I know I must keep on fighting I’ve come too far to turn back now

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’ll keep on pressing till I get to that place To the mark of the high calling In Christ Jesus we’ll stand still The road is narrow but I will still run for my Prize

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just to sit one day at His side When I get to that place He never said that it would be easy But He gave me something to stand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: His Word still keeps holding me While living in this evil land And though the whole world is crumbling around me My eyes are fixed on the Prize

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So Lord take me and completely fill me Get me ready to take that flight
